content.en:
Void Zone.

"It's copied out, and it's ready to practice!"

Ye Tian comprehended the change of will with the body of Qing Se's controller.

Although he was very unfamiliar with this body, he soon realized the difference between this body's will.

Qing Se had already mastered the Will-incarnation Realm at the peak of the Ninth Order, and this body was naturally the same, but he was not familiar with the Will-incarnated Form, so he was unable to exert the power of the Will-incarnated Form.

In other words, his body has the realm of volitional incarnation, but it can't be exerted.

Ye Tian didn't need to exert the power of the will transformation realm, he just needed to understand it silently.

Time passed slowly, and Ye Tian kept trying to change the shape of the will.

At this moment, he clearly felt that the will of the Qing Se controller was constantly changing, and he was in a state of change all the time, just like the Dao.

This change is inexplicable, and there seems to be no pattern.

"No wonder whether it is the master or the senior brothers and sisters, they can't say how to break through, and the transformation of the will is indescribable. In essence, the will of the Qing Se controller is also the peak realm of the ninth order, and even the quality and total amount are the same. However, there are many changes in will, but the changes in will seem to be irregular, and they are not like the Tao that can be comprehended. The changes in the Dao in the void of the Origin Realm Sea are dense and can be perceived, but the will cannot be comprehended in this way. "

Ye Tian said darkly.

Of course.

He now uses the body of Qing Se's controller to comprehend the change of the will of the Transformation Realm, even if he can't get the reason for the change of will, but after a long time, he can make the will change by himself, so as to break the shackles and be promoted to the will of the Transformation Realm.

In this way, year after year passed.

In the blink of an eye, thirty million realm river years have passed.

After such a long period of penance, Ye Tian has a lot of understanding of the volitional transformation realm.

this day.

Ye Tian annihilated the replica body of Qing Se's master, recondensed his body, and then began to break through with his replica body.

Airplanes!!!

Ye Tian's will was constantly changing under his control.

Time passed slowly, and the speed of change became faster and faster, but because Ye Tian's own will was not the same as the will of Qing Se's controller, his will kept collapsing at the beginning.

But fortunately, later, Ye Tian gradually grasped the slightest mystery of the change, and found the right direction in the dark.

this day.

Ye Tian finally let the change of will reach a certain critical point, triggering the final qualitative change.

Rumble!!!!

The will began to change itself, and although the will was still at the peak of the ninth order, his perception of the outside world and the degree and power of his will had undergone an incredible transformation.

Moreover, he can be will-willed.

It can be turned into a weapon, it can be turned into a clone, it can be turned into anything.

And it's not a simple change, but a real thing, just like Ye Tian's copying talent.

Of course, the most valuable thing is to turn into a clone of the will.

After all, many Eternal Masters have a real body, and if there is one more clone of will, it will be too useful.

The important thing is that the ability to save life has been enhanced a lot, and with a will clone, it is not easy to die.

Of course, once the will clone is solidified, if it falls, it will not be able to condense a will clone for a long time.

Now.

What Ye Tian was thinking about was whether to condense one will clone, no, he could condense two will clones.

If two will clones were condensed, there would be as many as four of his bodies.

Of course, four is a bit too much to use.

"Just condense a will clone, and you can use your will to transform into a weapon!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

Through chatting with several senior brothers and sisters, he knew that the most powerful weapon in the Origin Realm Sea was the Will Transformation Weapon. Some eternal masters who have condensed the will transformation realm will not condense the will clone, but will transform the weapon, and the will transformation weapon can transform into the most powerful weapon, which can improve their strength a lot.

After thinking about it, Ye Tian decided to condense a blade that could cooperate with the top-level origin control technique Space-Time Rifting Blade.

"Cohesion!"

The will power of the Transformation Realm at the peak of the ninth order began to condense, and under Ye Tian's control, it gradually turned into a bladed knife.

This bladed knife seemed to be an extension of Ye Tian's body, containing a power comparable to that of an eight-realm level master.

With this bladed knife and his own strength, Ye Tian's strength will skyrocket.

In fact, after mastering the power of the Will Transformation Realm, Ye Tian's strength had reached the combat power of the top Eight Realms-level controllers, and with the help of the Will Blade Knife and the two Ten Thousand Phases Statues, the strength he exerted was already comparable to that of the weaker Nine Realms-level controllers.

The Nine Realms level controller is the combat power realm of the Snow Maiden controller, and the entire Origin Realm River is extremely rare, and they are all the leaders of the top powers.

And Ye Tian has now reached this realm.

For some Eternal Masters with high talent and great potential, if there is a great opportunity, it is still easy to achieve.

Or there are those who use the Heaven Snatching Technique to get shortcuts, such as the Quanshan Master, but if you want to reach the Nine Realms level Master, it is very difficult.

Just like Ye Tian, although he is now infinitely close to the Nine Realms level master, it seems to have reached the limit.

He has mastered the volitional form realm and the primordial-level control body, and has also created many top-level origin controllers, but he is still at the Eight Realms level masters.

It seems that he has reached a bottleneck.

Next, it seems that only by relying on countless years of penance, silently accumulating the foundation, and using countless top-notch origin control techniques, to elevate the physical body to the extreme, and the will cannot continue to improve, can it be possible to ascend to the realm of the Nine Realms level master.

So, what about the Ten Realm-level masters?

So how do you get up?

this day.

Ye Tian came to visit the Snow Maiden controller and asked about this question.

He had asked before, but his strength had not been reached, and the Snow Maiden controller naturally asked him not to be ambitious.

But now, he's qualified to ask.

Soon, Ye Tian saw the Snow Maiden in control.

And the moment the Snow Girl controller saw Ye Tian, he was directly stunned.

"Little junior brother, you have mastered the Will Transformation Realm?"

The Snow Maiden was amazed.

"It's just a fluke!" Ye Tian said modestly.

The Snow Girl praised again and again: "Little junior brother, in our vein, I have only admired the third senior brother, and now there are more of you." Your speed of improving your strength is too fast, I'm afraid it won't be long before you can surpass me!"

"I'm far from my sister!"

Ye Tian hurriedly said.
